title: Plant Watering Can, 350 ml Stainless Steel Outdoor Indoor Watering Can for Garden Plants Potted Planters Hanging Plants(Black)

Size: The indoor watering can for house plants is about 19.2x8.6x8cm, and the capacity is 350 ml. It is easy to hold and easy to water

Lightweight and easy to use: This mini watering can design a long and narrow spout that accurately waters watering on the base of plants. It is a practical and easy-to-operate household plant watering pot
Widely used: This house plant watering can be used for small potted plants on windowsills, small potted plants and small plants in the office, and is a must-have for plant care
100% Satisfaction Guarantee: If you have any questions about watering cans, please feel free to contact us. Our primary goal is to provide our customers with satisfactory quality products
